report_name: Healthcare Software Firm Craneware Hit by Data Breach, Data Stolen

identities.name: Craneware plc
identities.description: A UK-based software supplier for US hospitals that suffered a cyberattack resulting in the exfiltration of a significant volume of employee, customer, and partner data.

identities.name: U.S. healthcare organizations
identities.description: A class of over 2,000 US hospitals that are customers of Craneware and are at risk of supply chain attacks or phishing campaigns due to the data breach.

indicators.name: Potential Phishing Email Leveraging Craneware Breach
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Phishing Email Leveraging Craneware Breach
id: 2b8c1f9a-5d7e-4b0c-8a1d-9f6e3c2b1a0e
status: experimental
description: Detects emails with subjects related to the Craneware data breach, which could be used in phishing campaigns against customers and partners.
references:
  - https://www.computing.co.uk/news/2026/security/cranewear-confirms-data-breach-after-cyberattack
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-20
tags:
  - attack.t1566
  - attack.initial_access
level: medium
logsource:
  category: email
detection:
  selection_subject:
    Subject|contains:
      - 'Craneware Security Incident'
      - 'Urgent: Craneware Update'
  selection_keywords:
    Body|contains|all:
      - 'Craneware'
      - 'breach'
      - 'incident'
  condition: 1 of selection_*
indicators.description: Detects potential phishing emails using subjects and keywords related to the Craneware data breach, as suggested in the article's hunting hints.
